info-ventilator-crius-v6.ts:
Comprehensive & Powerful Ventilator

High-end mechanical ventilator from Northern Meditec. A wide range of standard features and options allows you to fit the Crius V6 to your needs.

Details

Turbine Based

  • Shorter triggering and inspiratory delay
  • Powerful non-invasive ventilation
  • Compressor Free
  • Central Gas Free
  • Less cost

Control

Crius V6 is a fully electronic control ventilator.

Tidal Volume

20 to 2000mL (2 to 2000mL optional)

A wide range of TV adjustments allows the medical team to tailor the ventilator to multiple types/needs of patients.

Ventilation Modes

Invasive ventilation mode

  • VCV, PCV, PRVC, V-SIMV, P-SIMV, PRVC-SIMV, CPAP/PSV
  • CPAP-VG, APRV, Dual PAP; Optional: AMV, nCPAP

Non-invasive ventilation mode

  • PRVC, P-SIMV, PRVC-SIMV, Dual PAP, APRV, CPAP/PSV, CPAP-VG, nCPAP, Apnea Ventilation, PCV

Oxygen therapy

  • Provide high flow oxygen therapy (HFNC) function through nasal humidification (Maximum 100L/min)

Tools

  • Rlung, RSBI, P0.1, PEEPi, V-CO2, PTP, Expiratory Hold, Sigh, ATC, PCVR, PPS
  • Compliance, calibration, O2 suction, 100% O2, and more
  • Screen Freeze and Lock
  • Lung measurement tools: 3 loops

Multi-Clinical Demands

Departments: ICU, CCU, PACU, EICU, OR, In-Hospital Transport, etc.

Suitable for:

  • Adult and pediatric intensive care
  • Critical care transport
  • Long-term acute care

info-taurus.ts:
Taurus Patient Monitor

12.1" color TFT touch screen, wide and flat screen design. Multiple parameter options satisfy the need for ICU, CCU, NICU.

Configuration

ECG+SpO2+NIBP+2TEMP+PR+RESP, Li-ion battery

Optional

Masimo/Nellcor SpO2, EtCO2, C.O, 2-IBP, AG, BIS, NMT, Thermal recorder

Features

  • 12.1" color TFT LCD Touch screen
  • 8 waveform display, up to 12-lead ECG analysis
  • Powerful calculation (Hemodynamic, Dose, Oxygenation, Ventilation)
  • Pacemaker detection
  • ST & arrhythmia analysis
  • OxyCRGs
  • BIS module, NMT module optional
  • Wired/Wireless CMS, support HL7 protocol to HIS
  • SpO2 pulse-tone modulation (Pitch Tone)
  • MEWS (Modified Early Warning Score)
  • Graphical & tabular trend review (480 hours)
  • 48h full disclosure wave review for each patient

info-yk-8000c-patient-monitor.ts:
Multi-parameter Patient Monitor for Clinical Assessments — YK-8000C

The Periodmed YK-8000C is an advanced patient monitor tailored for clinical functional assessments, ideal for in-depth vital sign tracking and health status evaluation in clinical settings.

Specifications

  • Model: YK-8000C
  • Display: 12.1-inch TFT screen
  • Standard parameters: SpO2, PR, NIBP, ECG, Resp, Temp
  • Optional: EtCO2, Nellcor SpO2, 2-IBP, Recorder, Touch Screen, Trolley, Wall Mount
  • Power: AC 100–240V, 50/60Hz + DC rechargeable Li-ion battery (11.1V 24Wh)
  • Origin: Jiangsu, China
  • Certifications: CE, ISO13485, FSC, ISO9001

Advanced Patient Monitor for Clinical Functional Assessments

The YK-8000C delivers precise monitoring of core parameters (ECG for heart activity, NIBP for non-invasive blood pressure, SpO2 for blood oxygen levels) to support comprehensive functional assessments. It is equipped with essential accessories: SpO2 sensor, ECG Cable, NIBP cuff and tube, power cord, ground wire, and a detailed User Manual.

Practical User-Friendly Features

  • 12.1-inch color LCD display suitable for adult and pediatric patients
  • Multi-channel waveform display and ST segment analysis
  • Adjustable alarm sounds with ECG waveform recording and review
  • Built-in rechargeable lithium battery with data power-off storage

WIFI with Smart IT Solutions

  • Wireless integration with Central Monitoring Station
  • 240 hours dynamic trend storage
  • 8 traces per monitor, 16 monitors per screen, up to 64 beds on one platform
  • Remote patient data review — in-hospital or pre-hospital settings

Technical Specifications

  • Standard parameters: ECG, SpO2, NIBP, TEMP, PR/HR, RESP
  • Optional parameters: Built-in recorder, monitor bracket trolley, monitor wall mount
  • Power: 220V AC, 50/60Hz
  • Max input power: 70VA
  • Battery: Internal rechargeable battery
  • Dimensions (equipment): 305 × 162 × 290mm (approx. 4kg)
  • Package dimensions: 380 × 350 × 300mm (approx. 4.5kg)

Accessories included: ECG Cable, SpO2 sensor, temperature sensor, NIBP cuff and tube, power cord, ground wire, user manual.

info-yk-8000b-patient-monitor.ts:
PACU Patient Monitoring Device — YK-8000B

The Periodmed YK-8000B is a reliable modular patient monitor designed for PACU, ICU, CCU, and surgical procedures, delivering precision monitoring across adult, pediatric, and neonatal patients.

Specifications

  • Model: YK-8000B
  • Display: 12.1-inch TFT screen
  • Application: Adult / Pediatric / Neonatal / Medicine / Surgery / OR / ICU / CCU
  • Standard parameters: SpO2, PR, NIBP, ECG, Resp, Temp
  • Optional: EtCO2, Nellcor SpO2, 2-IBP, Touch Screen, Recorder, Trolley, Wall Mount
  • Languages: English, Spanish, Portuguese, Polish, Russian, Turkish, French, Italian
  • Power: AC 100–240V, 50/60Hz + DC rechargeable Li-ion battery (11.1V 24Wh)

Precision at Every Beat

  • 8 parameters (ECG, RESP, SpO2, NIBP, PR, TEMP, IBP, EtCO2) + fully independent modules
  • Modular design — flexible for different monitoring requirements
  • Patient info input management function
  • 400 groups of NIBP list, 6,000 seconds ECG waveform recall
  • 60 alarm event records, 7-day trend chart storage

Reliable Monitoring for Surgical Procedures

The YK-8000B offers versatile clinical capabilities to monitor a wide range of patients with ease of operation for all professional levels. Excellent reliability is driven by high-quality Periodmed design and engineering, all at an affordable price that enables world-class monitoring technology within your budget.

Key Features

  • 12.1" color LCD display with multi-channel waveform and ST segment analysis
  • Adjustable alarm sounds with recording and ECG waveform review
  • Wireless integration with Central Monitoring Station
  • 240 hours dynamic trend storage
  • 8 traces per monitor, 16 monitors per screen, up to 64 beds on one platform
  • Remote patient data review — clinical or pre-hospital settings

Accessories included: ECG Cable, SpO2 sensor, temperature sensor, NIBP cuff and tube, power cord, ground wire, user manual.

info-new-pe-e12a-portable-ecg-monitor.ts:
New PE-E12A Portable ECG Monitor

The Periodmed PE-E12A combines precision and portability, delivering reliable 12-lead ECG acquisition for accurate cardiac assessments in diverse clinical settings.

Specifications

  • Model: PE-E12A
  • Display: 7-inch TFT screen
  • Working modes: Manual / Auto / R-R / Store
  • Filters: AC 50/60Hz, EMG 25/45Hz, Anti-Drift 0.15Hz (adaptive)
  • Power: AC 110–230V, 50/60Hz + DC rechargeable 14.4V 4400mAh battery

12-Lead Ergonomic ECG Monitor

  • High-accuracy digital filter and automatic baseline adjustment for reliable data
  • Simultaneous 12-lead acquisition capturing comprehensive cardiac data
  • Supports USB/UART ports for storage and USB & LAN multifunctional connectivity
  • Thermal printer traces every ECG waveform dot clearly
  • Built-in protection against defibrillator for safety during critical procedures
  • Suitable for adult and pediatric patients

Automatic ECG Measurement & Diagnosis

The PE-E12A automatically measures and diagnoses ECG waveform parameters, delivering key data like heart rate along with automatic diagnostic conclusions. ECG parameters can be recorded manually or automatically, adapting to different clinical needs. This significantly eases doctors' workload, boosting efficiency in routine cardiac assessments.

Print & Preview

  • Simplified patient information input
  • Dedicated interface to print patient reports with preview function
  • ECG automatic measurement/analysis technology for any heartbeat
  • Smart feature removes poor-quality waveforms for data reliability

Languages supported: Simplified Chinese, English, Ukrainian, German, Italian, Polish

info-high-accuracy-infusion-pump-pi-ip3a.ts:
High Accuracy Infusion Pump for Clinical Use — PI-IP3A

Periodmed PI-IP3A delivers high accuracy, portability, advanced safety, and user-friendly interface for emergency, routine, and specialized care.

Specifications

  • Model: PI-IP3A
  • Display: 3-inch LCD screen
  • Alarm: Yes
  • Infusion speed: 1–1200ml/h (0.1ml/h increments)
  • Accuracy error: ±5% (ordinary infusion set)
  • Blocking pressure: High 110kpa / Medium 80kpa / Low 40kpa
  • KVO: 1–5ml/h (1ml/h increments)
  • Waterproof: IPX1
  • Power: Rechargeable Lithium battery
  • Infusion volume preset: 0.1–9999.9ml (0.1ml increments)

Key Features

  • Auto-progress KVO mode prevents blockages
  • Real-time bubble monitoring for safety
  • Portable design for emergency & bedside use
  • ±5% accuracy ensures therapeutic effectiveness
  • Suitable for ICU, emergency, clinics, and hospitals

info-high-precision-syringe-pump-for-ccu.ts:
High-Precision Syringe Pump for CCU — PI-SP1

The Periodmed PI-SP1 is a high-precision micro syringe pump for vasoactive drug infusion in CCU, delivering uncompromising accuracy and safety for critically ill cardiac patients.

Specifications

  • Model: PI-SP1 | Class: II | Warranty: 2 years
  • Dimensions: 370×210×230mm | Display: LED + LCD
  • Application: Medicine / Surgery / OR / ICU / CCU
  • Languages: English, Spanish, Portuguese, Polish, Russian, Turkish, French, Italian
  • Delivery: Stock goods shipped within 3 days

High-Precision Micro Syringe Pump for Vasoactive Drug Infusion

The PI-SP1 stores up to 2,000 operation, alarm, and modification records for full traceability. Three editable pressure levels ensure strict accuracy for vasoactive agents requiring precise concentration control. A system self-test on startup verifies alarm indicators, volume, and pressure functions, while real-time monitoring mitigates infusion risks. Tailored for CCU's high-stakes settings, it guarantees safe delivery of life-sustaining vasoactive drugs.

Key Features for CCU Excellence

  • Automatic lock screen prevents accidental operation errors
  • 2,000 treatment records support full traceability of cardiac care
  • 3 adjustable pressure levels ensure precise drug dosing
  • One-key rotary knob with innovative interactive interface
  • System self-test checks for air bubbles, volume, and pressure issues
  • Lightweight & portable for bedside continuous sedation delivery
  • Adjustable flow rate for postoperative cardiac care recovery

The PI-SP1 blends portability with user-friendly design, making it the optimal choice for CCU's postoperative cardiac care — supporting smooth recovery and reducing post-surgical complications.
